# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Docker registry URL (e.g., registry.example.com)',
            trim: true
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Docker image name (e.g., myapp)',
            trim: true
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Docker image tag (e.g., 1.0.0, latest)',
            trim: true
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Path to the Dockerfile context directory',
            trim: true
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials ID for Docker registry authentication',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: true
        )
    }

    environment {
        SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL = ''
        SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME = ''
        SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG = ''
        SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH = ''
        FULL_IMAGE_REF = ''
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL parameter is required and cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error('IMAGE_NAME parameter is required and cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG?.trim()) {
                        error('IMAGE_TAG parameter is required and cannot be empty.')
                    }
                    if (!params.DOCKERFILE_PATH?.trim()) {
                        error('DOCKERFILE_PATH parameter is required and cannot be empty.')
                    }

                    // Validate registry URL - allow only valid hostname/port patterns
                    def registryPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-\.]*[a-zA-Z0-9])?(:[0-9]{1,5})?(\/[a-zA-Z0-9\-_\.]+)*$/
                    if (!(params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL.trim() ==~ registryPattern)) {
                        error("Invalid DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL: '${params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL}'. Must be a valid registry hostname with optional port and path.")
                    }

                    // Validate image name - allow only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots, and slashes
                    def imageNamePattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\-_\.\/]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$/
                    if (!(params.IMAGE_NAME.trim() ==~ imageNamePattern)) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_NAME: '${params.IMAGE_NAME}'. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, dots, and slashes.")
                    }

                    // Validate image tag - allow only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots
                    def imageTagPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\-_\.]*$/
                    if (!(params.IMAGE_TAG.trim() ==~ imageTagPattern)) {
                        error("Invalid IMAGE_TAG: '${params.IMAGE_TAG}'. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots.")
                    }

                    // Validate Dockerfile path - prevent directory traversal
                    def dockerfilePath = params.DOCKERFILE_PATH.trim()
                    if (dockerfilePath.contains('..') || dockerfilePath.contains('~') || dockerfilePath.startsWith('/')) {
                        error("Invalid DOCKERFILE_PATH: '${dockerfilePath}'. Must be a relative path without directory traversal.")
                    }
                    def dockerfilePathPattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\-_\.\/]*$/
                    if (dockerfilePath != '.' && !(dockerfilePath ==~ dockerfilePathPattern)) {
                        error("Invalid DOCKERFILE_PATH: '${dockerfilePath}'. Contains disallowed characters.")
                    }

                    env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL = params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_URL.trim()
                    env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME = params.IMAGE_NAME.trim()
                    env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG = params.IMAGE_TAG.trim()
                    env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH = dockerfilePath
                    env.FULL_IMAGE_REF = "${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG}"

                    echo "Validated parameters:"
                    echo "  Registry URL: ${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}"
                    echo "  Image Name: ${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "  Image Tag: ${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "  Dockerfile Path: ${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    echo "  Full Image Reference: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Dockerfile Exists') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def dockerfileLoc = "${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}/Dockerfile"
                    if (!fileExists(dockerfileLoc)) {
                        error("Dockerfile not found at path: ${dockerfileLoc}")
                    }
                    echo "Dockerfile found at: ${dockerfileLoc}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
                    docker.build(
                        env.FULL_IMAGE_REF,
                        "--no-cache --pull ${env.SANITIZED_DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    )
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
                    docker.withRegistry(
                        "https://${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}",
                        params.DOCKER_REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS
                    ) {
                        def image = docker.image(env.FULL_IMAGE_REF)
                        image.push()

                        // Also push as 'latest' if the tag is not already 'latest'
                        if (env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG != 'latest') {
                            image.push('latest')
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo 'Cleaning up local Docker images...'
                try {
                    sh "docker rmi ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF} || true"
                    if (env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_TAG != 'latest') {
                        sh "docker rmi ${env.SANITIZED_REGISTRY_URL}/${env.SANITIZED_IMAGE_NAME}:latest || true"
                    }
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    echo "Warning: Failed to clean up Docker images: ${e.getMessage()}"
                }
            }
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Successfully built and pushed Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Failed to build or push Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_REF}"
        }
    }
}
